context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 196 Multi-State Emotion Layering fully working. (1) Backend POST /api/moods accepts 'moods' array for multi-select, returns frequency_stack, geometry_stack, resonance_type ('pure' for single, 'chorded' for multi). (2) Frontend MoodTracker at /mood has multi-select grid with numbered badges, Moiré shimmer overlay for 2+ moods, frequency stack panel showing Hz values, submit button text changes to 'Capture N Layers'. (3) Mood deselection works by clicking the pill. (4) Persistent waveform at bottom of page (data-testid='persistent-waveform'). All regression APIs working.
